evals.expected_output: Skill loads, detects STATE CHECK callout (unpopulated), tells the user setup takes 20-40 min, offers sample/interview/hybrid modes, does NOT default to a mode.

assertions.text: Skill detects unpopulated state via STATE CHECK
Skill offers three modes: sample, interview, hybrid
Skill does not default to a mode without user choice

evals.prompt: Write a quick post for me. (assumes populated SOUL)
evals.expected_output: Skill applies the Notice + Care check BEFORE polishing prose. Asks 'would the user have noticed/cared/chosen to say this?' Applies expression rules. Copies to clipboard.

assertions.text: Skill runs Notice + Care check first
Skill applies Expression rules (banned chars, banned phrases)
Skill copies final draft to clipboard
